questions.question: Which control best reduces damage from a compromised intermediate CA key?
questions.description: Name constraints, monitoring, and rapid revocation reduce the scope and duration of compromise.

questions.question: Why should private CA keys be generated and stored in an HSM?
options: To prevent key extraction and enforce key operations
To make keys easier to email
questions.description: HSMs protect private keys and provide controlled cryptographic operations.

questions.question: Which validation problem is caused by a missing intermediate certificate on the server?
questions.description: Servers should send the required intermediate certificates so clients can build the chain.
